sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dict (id INT PRIMARY KEY, config JSON);
SELECT dict_remove(config, 'key1') FROM test_dict WHERE id = 1;
SELECT NOT dict_remove(config, 'key3') FROM test_dict WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, dict_remove(config, CASE WHEN id = 1 THEN 'key2' ELSE 'key1' END) as removed FROM test_dict;
INSERT INTO test_dict (id, config) VALUES (2, '{"keyA": null, "keyB": "valueB"}');
SELECT id, NOT dict_remove(config, 'keyA') AS was_key_a_removed FROM test_dict WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, dict_remove(config, 'keyB') FROM test_dict WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_dict WHERE id > 0);
SELECT id FROM (SELECT *, dict_remove(config, 'key1') AS removal_status FROM test_dict) sub WHERE NOT removal_status = 0;
CREATE TABLE test_table (col1 TEXT, col2 INT, col3 FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_table (col1, col2, col3) VALUES ('string', 2, 3.14);
INSERT INTO test_table (col1, col2, col3) VALUES (NULL, NULL, NULL);
SELECT NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_table WHERE dict_remove('string', 'nonexistent_key') IS NOT NULL);
SELECT col1, NOT dict_remove(CAST(col1 AS JSON), 'nonexistent_key') FROM test_table GROUP BY col1 HAVING NOT COUNT(*) = 0;
SELECT col1, SUM(CASE WHEN NOT dict_remove(config, 'keyA') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM test_dict JOIN test_table ON test_dict.id = test_table.col2 GROUP BY col1;
SELECT dict_remove(CAST('{"key1":"value1"}' AS JSON), NOT 'key1') AS removed_key FROM dual;
